items.title: Video: Siya Goyal, Chetan Chaudhary At Undated Cricket Match
items.summary: Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary are accused of killing Ketan Agarwal, her fiance.

items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Rescuers Work as Window Narrows to Find Quake Survivors
items.summary: International teams were joining search efforts on Saturday after twin earthquakes killed more than 900 people in northern Venezuela and left many others trapped.
